last_assistant_message:
Status: Complete. Commit `e823af58` on branch `rebrand`.

Files changed (4):

- `AGENTS.md` - Updated tmux section header ("Testing DG-Claw Interactive Mode with tmux"), session name `pi-test` -> `dg-claw-test`, script reference `pi-test.sh` -> `dg-claw-test.sh`, and both CHANGELOG attribution GitHub URLs from `badlogic/pi-mono` to `forsonny/DG-Claw`.

- `CONTRIBUTING.md` - Title changed to "Contributing to DG-Claw", "pi-mono root directory" -> "DG-Claw root directory", "pi's core is minimal" -> "DG-Claw's core is minimal".

- `LICENSE` - Added `Copyright (c) 2026 DG-Claw Contributors` on a new line below the existing `Copyright (c) 2025 Mario Zechner` line.

- `README.md` - Fully replaced with the specified DG-Claw content.

One concern to note: the LICENSE file has "2025" for Mario Zechner, not "2024" as specified in the task description. The actual file was used as-is rather than modifying the existing year, since the task said "keep original copyright."
